# Block all search engine bots from indexing
User-agent: *
Disallow: /

# Explicitly block major bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Disallow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Disallow: /

User-agent: YandexBot
Disallow: /
